data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — AC2 (≥5 function names): PASS (36 matches), AC3 (≥3 FAILs): PASS (15 FAIL lines). Note: AC1 (run-all.sh) times out with exit 144 — pre-existing infrastructure issue also present before my changes (run-all.sh hangs on test-end-session-error-sweep.sh due to CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unbound variable). All 7 original tests pass; all 7 new tests fail (RED) as required.
